revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Taoism footer |title = [[Taoism]] |listclass = hlist |basestyle = background: #cce0f0; |state = {{{state|{{{1|autocollapse}}}}}} |image = [[File:BatQuaiDo_2.svg|80px|Taoism]] |above = |group1 = [[Taoist philosophy|Philosophy]] |list1 = {{Navbox|child|basestyle = background: #ddeef3;|group1 = [[Taoist cosmology|Metaphysics]] |list1= * '''[[Tao]]''' (way) * '''''[[Taiji (philosophy)|Taiji]]''''' (ultimate) ** ''[[Wuji (philosophy)|Wuji]]'' (non-polarity) ** [[Yin and yang]] (duality) ** ''[[Bagua]]'' (eight trigrams) * [[Feng shui]] * ''[[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Wuxing]]'' (five phases) * ''[[Bianhua]]'' (transformation) * ''[[Fan (Daoism)|Fan]]'' (reversion) }} * {{Navbox|basestyle = background: #ddeef3;|child |group2 = [[Taoist ethics|Ethics]] |list2= * '''''[[De (Chinese)|De]]''''' (integrity) * '''''[[Wu wei]]''''' (nonaction) * '''''[[Ziran]]''''' (spontenaity) ** ''[[Pu (Daoism)|Pu]]'' (plainness) * ''[[Zhenren]]'' * [[Five Precepts (Taoism)|Five Precepts]] * [[Ten Precepts (Taoism)|Ten Precepts]] }} |group2 = Practice |list2 = * ''[[Neidan]]'' (internal alchemy) * ''[[Waidan]]'' (external alchemy) * ''[[Yangsheng (Daoism)|Yangsheng]]'' (self-cultivation) ** ''[[Daoyin]]'' (calisthenics) * [[Taoist meditation|Meditation]] * [[Three Treasures (traditional Chinese medicine)|Three Treasures]] ** ''[[Jing (Chinese medicine)|Jing]]'' (essence) ** [[Qi]] (breath) ** ''[[Shen (Chinese religion)|Shen]]'' (spirit) * [[Taoist diet|Diet]] * ''[[Xian (Taoism)|Xian]]'' (immortality) * [[Taoist art|Art]] ** ''[[Fulu]]'' (talismancy) |group3 = Texts |list3 = * ''[[Tao Te Ching]]'' * ''[[Zhuangzi (book)|Zhuangzi]]'' * ''[[Liezi]]'' * ''[[Huainanzi]]'' * ''[[Taipingjing]]'' * ''[[Xiang'er]]'' * ''[[Sanhuangjing]]'' * ''[[Huahujing]]'' * ''[[Qingjing Jing]]'' * ''[[Baopuzi]]'' * ''[[Daozang]]''
|group4 = [[Chinese theology#Taoism|Deities]] |list4 = * [[Hongjun Laozu]] * [[Three Pure Ones]] ** [[Yuanshi Tianzun]] ** [[Lingbao Tianzun]] ** [[Daode Tianzun]] *[[Four heavenly ministers|Four Sovereigns]] ** [[Jade Emperor]] ** [[Ziwei Emperor]] ** [[Tianhuang Emperor]] ** [[Houtu]] * [[Three Great Emperor-Officials]] * [[Queen Mother of the West]] * [[King Father of the East]] * [[Eight Immortals]] * [[Chang'e]] * [[Three Sovereigns and Five Emperors]] ** [[Yellow Emperor]] * [[Guan Yu#Worship of Guan Yu|Guan Shengdi]] * [[:Category:Taoist deities|''Other deities'']]
|group5 = People |list5 = * [[Laozi]] * [[Zhuang Zhou]] * [[Lie Yukou]] * [[Heshang Gong]] * [[Wei Boyang]] * [[Zhang Daoling]] * [[Gan Ji]] * [[Zhang Jue]] * [[Zhang Lu (Han dynasty)|Zhang Lu]] * [[Ge Xuan]] * [[He Yan]] * [[Wang Bi]] * [[Seven Sages of the Bamboo Grove]] * [[Guo Xiang]] * [[Wei Huacun]] * [[Ge Hong]] * [[Bao Jingyan]] * [[Kou Qianzhi]] * [[Lu Xiujing]] * [[Tao Hongjing]] * [[Cheng Xuanying]] * [[Chen Tuan]] * [[Zhang Boduan]] * [[Sun Bu'er]] * [[Wang Chongyang]] * [[Qiu Chuji]] * [[Zhang Guoxiang]] * [[Zhang Sanfeng]] * [[Zhu Quan]] * [[Fangshi|''Fangshi'']]
|group6 = [[Taoist schools|Schools]] |list6 =
* [[Huang–Lao]] * [[Way of the Taiping|Taiping]] * [[Way of the Five Pecks of Rice]] * [[Way of the Celestial Masters]] ** [[The Northern Celestial Masters|Northern Celestial Masters]] ** [[Zhengyi Dao|Zhengyi]] * [[Xuanxue]] * [[Shangqing School|Shangqing]] * [[Lingbao School|Lingbao]] ** [[Jingming Dao|Jingming]] * [[Chongxuan School|Chongxuan]] * [[Quanzhen School|Quanzhen]] ([[Dragon Gate Taoism|Dragon Gate]]) * [[Wuliupai|Wuliu]] * [[Yao Taoism|Yao]]
|group7 = Sacred places |list7 = * [[Grotto-heavens]] * [[Sacred Mountains of China]] ** [[Wudang Mountains]] * [[Mount Penglai]] * [[Kunlun (mythology)|Mount Kunlun]] * [[Taoist temple|Temples]] ** [[Cebu Taoist Temple|Cebu]] ** [[Taoist Temple (Hanford, California)|Hanford]] ** [[Louguantai]] ** [[Tong Jee Teung]] ** [[White Cloud Temple|White Cloud]]

}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude>

{{Navbox |name = Taoism footer |title = [[Taoism]] |listclass = hlist |basestyle = background: #cce0f0; |state = {{{state|{{{1|autocollapse}}}}}} |image = [[File:BatQuaiDo_2.svg|80px|Taoism]] |above = |group1 = [[Taoist philosophy|Philosophy]] |list1 = {{Navbox|child|basestyle = background: #ddeef3;|group1 = [[Taoist cosmology|Metaphysics]] |list1= * '''[[Tao]]''' (way) * '''''[[Taiji (philosophy)|Taiji]]''''' (ultimate) ** ''[[Wuji (philosophy)|Wuji]]'' (non-polarity) ** [[Yin and yang]] (duality) ** ''[[:en:Bagua|Bagua]]'' (eight trigrams) * [[:en:Feng shui|Feng shui]] * ''[[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Wuxing]]'' (five phases) * ''[[Bianhua]]'' (transformation) * ''[[:en:Fan (Daoism)|Fan]]'' (reversion) }} * {{Navbox|basestyle = background: #ddeef3;|child |group2 = [[Taoist ethics|Ethics]] |list2= * '''''[[De (Chinese)|De]]''''' (integrity) * '''''[[Wu wei]]''''' (nonaction) * '''''[[Ziran]]''''' (spontenaity) ** ''[[Pu (Daoism)|Pu]]'' (plainness) * ''[[Zhenren]]'' * [[Five Precepts (Taoism)|Five Precepts]] * [[Ten Precepts (Taoism)|Ten Precepts]] }} |group2 = Practice |list2 = * ''[[Neidan]]'' (internal alchemy) * ''[[Waidan]]'' (external alchemy) * ''[[Yangsheng (Daoism)|Yangsheng]]'' (self-cultivation) ** ''[[:en:Daoyin|Daoyin]]'' (calisthenics) * [[Taoist meditation|Meditation]] * [[Three Treasures (traditional Chinese medicine)|Three Treasures]] ** ''[[Jing (Chinese medicine)|Jing]]'' (essence) ** [[Qi]] (breath) ** ''[[Shen (Chinese religion)|Shen]]'' (spirit) * [[Taoist diet|Diet]] * ''[[Xian (Taoism)|Xian]]'' (immortality) * [[Taoist art|Art]] ** ''[[Fulu]]'' (talismancy) |group3 = Texts |list3 = * ''[[Tao Te Ching]]'' * ''[[Zhuangzi (book)|Zhuangzi]]'' * ''[[Liezi]]'' * ''[[Huainanzi]]'' * ''[[Taipingjing]]'' * ''[[Xiang'er]]'' * ''[[Sanhuangjing]]'' * ''[[Huahujing]]'' * ''[[Qingjing Jing]]'' * ''[[:en:Baopuzi|Baopuzi]]'' * ''[[:en:Daozang|Daozang]]''
|group4 = [[Chinese theology#Taoism|Deities]] |list4 = * [[Hongjun Laozu]] * [[Three Pure Ones]] ** [[Yuanshi Tianzun]] ** [[Lingbao Tianzun]] ** [[:en:Daode Tianzun|Daode Tianzun]] *[[Four heavenly ministers|Four Sovereigns]] ** [[Jade Emperor]] ** [[Ziwei Emperor]] ** [[Tianhuang Emperor]] ** [[Houtu]] * [[Three Great Emperor-Officials]] * [[Queen Mother of the West]] * [[King Father of the East]] * [[Eight Immortals]] * [[Chang'e]] * [[Three Sovereigns and Five Emperors]] ** [[Yellow Emperor]] * [[Guan Yu#Worship of Guan Yu|Guan Shengdi]] * [[:Category:Taoist deities|''Other deities'']]
|group5 = People |list5 = * [[Laozi]] * [[Zhuang Zhou]] * [[Lie Yukou]] * [[Heshang Gong]] * [[Wei Boyang]] * [[Zhang Daoling]] * [[Gan Ji]] * [[Zhang Jue]] * [[Zhang Lu (Han dynasty)|Zhang Lu]] * [[Ge Xuan]] * [[He Yan]] * [[Wang Bi]] * [[Seven Sages of the Bamboo Grove]] * [[Guo Xiang]] * [[Wei Huacun]] * [[Ge Hong]] * [[:en:Bao Jingyan|Bao Jingyan]] * [[Kou Qianzhi]] * [[Lu Xiujing]] * [[Tao Hongjing]] * [[Cheng Xuanying]] * [[Chen Tuan]] * [[Zhang Boduan]] * [[Sun Bu'er]] * [[Wang Chongyang]] * [[Qiu Chuji]] * [[Zhang Guoxiang]] * [[Zhang Sanfeng]] * [[Zhu Quan]] * [[:en:Fangshi|''Fangshi'']]
|group6 = [[Taoist schools|Schools]] |list6 =
* [[Huang–Lao]] * [[Way of the Taiping|Taiping]] * [[Way of the Five Pecks of Rice]] * [[Way of the Celestial Masters]] ** [[The Northern Celestial Masters|Northern Celestial Masters]] ** [[Zhengyi Dao|Zhengyi]] * [[Xuanxue]] * [[Shangqing School|Shangqing]] * [[Lingbao School|Lingbao]] ** [[Jingming Dao|Jingming]] * [[Chongxuan School|Chongxuan]] * [[Quanzhen School|Quanzhen]] ([[Dragon Gate Taoism|Dragon Gate]]) * [[Wuliupai|Wuliu]] * [[Yao Taoism|Yao]]

* [[Huang–Lao]] * [[Way of the Taiping|Taiping]] * [[Way of the Five Pecks of Rice]] * [[Way of the Celestial Masters]] ** [[The Northern Celestial Masters|Northern Celestial Masters]] ** [[Zhengyi Dao|Zhengyi]] * [[Xuanxue]] * [[Shangqing School|Shangqing]] * [[Lingbao School|Lingbao]] ** [[Jingming Dao|Jingming]] * [[Chongxuan School|Chongxuan]] * [[Quanzhen School|Quanzhen]] ([[Dragon Gate Taoism|Dragon Gate]]) * [[Wuliupai|Wuliu]] * [[Yao Taoism|Yao]]

{{Navbox |name = Taoism footer |title = [[Taoism]] |listclass = hlist |basestyle = background: #cce0f0; |state = {{{state|{{{1|autocollapse}}}}}} |image = [[File:BatQuaiDo_2.svg|80px|Taoism]] |above = |group1 = [[Taoist philosophy|Philosophy]] |list1 = {{Navbox|child|basestyle = background: #ddeef3;|group1 = [[Taoist cosmology|Metaphysics]] |list1= * '''[[Tao]]''' (way) * '''''[[Taiji (philosophy)|Taiji]]''''' (ultimate) ** ''[[Wuji (philosophy)|Wuji]]'' (non-polarity) ** [[Yin and yang]] (duality) ** ''[[:en:Bagua|Bagua]]'' (eight trigrams) * [[:en:Feng shui|Feng shui]] * ''[[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Wuxing]]'' (five phases) * ''[[Bianhua]]'' (transformation) * ''[[:en:Fan (Daoism)|Fan]]'' (reversion) }} * {{Navbox|basestyle = background: #ddeef3;|child |group2 = [[Taoist ethics|Ethics]] |list2= * '''''[[:en:De (Chinese)|De]]''''' (integrity) * '''''[[Wu wei]]''''' (nonaction) * '''''[[Ziran]]''''' (spontenaity) ** ''[[Pu (Daoism)|Pu]]'' (plainness) * ''[[Zhenren]]'' * [[:en:Five Precepts (Taoism)|Five Precepts]] * [[Ten Precepts (Taoism)|Ten Precepts]] }} |group2 = Practice |list2 = * ''[[Neidan]]'' (internal alchemy) * ''[[Waidan]]'' (external alchemy) * ''[[Yangsheng (Daoism)|Yangsheng]]'' (self-cultivation) ** ''[[:en:Daoyin|Daoyin]]'' (calisthenics) * [[Taoist meditation|Meditation]] * [[Three Treasures (traditional Chinese medicine)|Three Treasures]] ** ''[[Jing (Chinese medicine)|Jing]]'' (essence) ** [[Qi]] (breath) ** ''[[Shen (Chinese religion)|Shen]]'' (spirit) * [[Taoist diet|Diet]] * ''[[Xian (Taoism)|Xian]]'' (immortality) * [[Taoist art|Art]] ** ''[[Fulu]]'' (talismancy) |group3 = Texts |list3 = * ''[[Tao Te Ching]]'' * ''[[Zhuangzi (book)|Zhuangzi]]'' * ''[[Liezi]]'' * ''[[Huainanzi]]'' * ''[[Taipingjing]]'' * ''[[Xiang'er]]'' * ''[[Sanhuangjing]]'' * ''[[Huahujing]]'' * ''[[Qingjing Jing]]'' * ''[[:en:Baopuzi|Baopuzi]]'' * ''[[:en:Daozang|Daozang]]''
|group4 = [[Chinese theology#Taoism|Deities]] |list4 = * [[Hongjun Laozu]] * [[Three Pure Ones]] ** [[Yuanshi Tianzun]] ** [[Lingbao Tianzun]] ** [[:en:Daode Tianzun|Daode Tianzun]] *[[Four heavenly ministers|Four Sovereigns]] ** [[Jade Emperor]] ** [[Ziwei Emperor]] ** [[Tianhuang Emperor]] ** [[Houtu]] * [[Three Great Emperor-Officials]] * [[Queen Mother of the West]] * [[King Father of the East]] * [[Eight Immortals]] * [[:en:Chang'e|Chang'e]] * [[Three Sovereigns and Five Emperors]] ** [[Yellow Emperor]] * [[Guan Yu#Worship of Guan Yu|Guan Shengdi]] * [[:Category:Taoist deities|''Other deities'']]
|group5 = People |list5 = * [[Laozi]] * [[Zhuang Zhou]] * [[Lie Yukou]] * [[Heshang Gong]] * [[Wei Boyang]] * [[Zhang Daoling]] * [[Gan Ji]] * [[Zhang Jue]] * [[Zhang Lu (Han dynasty)|Zhang Lu]] * [[Ge Xuan]] * [[He Yan]] * [[Wang Bi]] * [[Seven Sages of the Bamboo Grove]] * [[Guo Xiang]] * [[Wei Huacun]] * [[Ge Hong]] * [[:en:Bao Jingyan|Bao Jingyan]] * [[Kou Qianzhi]] * [[Lu Xiujing]] * [[Tao Hongjing]] * [[Cheng Xuanying]] * [[:en:Chen Tuan|Chen Tuan]] * [[Zhang Boduan]] * [[Sun Bu'er]] * [[Wang Chongyang]] * [[Qiu Chuji]] * [[Zhang Guoxiang]] * [[Zhang Sanfeng]] * [[Zhu Quan]] * [[:en:Fangshi|''Fangshi'']]
|group6 = [[Taoist schools|Schools]] |list6 =
* [[Huang–Lao]] * [[Way of the Taiping|Taiping]] * [[Way of the Five Pecks of Rice]] * [[Way of the Celestial Masters]] ** [[The Northern Celestial Masters|Northern Celestial Masters]] ** [[Zhengyi Dao|Zhengyi]] * [[Xuanxue]] * [[Shangqing School|Shangqing]] * [[Lingbao School|Lingbao]] ** [[Jingming Dao|Jingming]] * [[Chongxuan School|Chongxuan]] * [[Quanzhen School|Quanzhen]] ([[Dragon Gate Taoism|Dragon Gate]]) * [[Wuliupai|Wuliu]] * [[Yao Taoism|Yao]]

{{Navbox |name = Taoism footer |title = [[Taoism]] |listclass = hlist |basestyle = background: #cce0f0; |state = {{{state|{{{1|autocollapse}}}}}} |image = [[File:BatQuaiDo_2.svg|80px|Taoism]] |above = |group1 = [[Taoist philosophy|Philosophy]] |list1 = {{Navbox|child|basestyle = background: #ddeef3;|group1 = [[Taoist cosmology|Metaphysics]] |list1= * '''[[Tao]]''' (way) * '''''[[Taiji (philosophy)|Taiji]]''''' (ultimate) ** ''[[Wuji (philosophy)|Wuji]]'' (non-polarity) ** [[Yin and yang]] (duality) ** ''[[:en:Bagua|Bagua]]'' (eight trigrams) * [[:en:Feng shui|Feng shui]] * ''[[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Wuxing]]'' (five phases) * ''[[:en:Bianhua|Bianhua]]'' (transformation) * ''[[:en:Fan (Daoism)|Fan]]'' (reversion) }} * {{Navbox|basestyle = background: #ddeef3;|child |group2 = [[Taoist ethics|Ethics]] |list2= * '''''[[:en:De (Chinese)|De]]''''' (integrity) * '''''[[Wu wei]]''''' (nonaction) * '''''[[Ziran]]''''' (spontenaity) ** ''[[Pu (Daoism)|Pu]]'' (plainness) * ''[[Zhenren]]'' * [[:en:Five Precepts (Taoism)|Five Precepts]] * [[Ten Precepts (Taoism)|Ten Precepts]] }} |group2 = Practice |list2 = * ''[[Neidan]]'' (internal alchemy) * ''[[Waidan]]'' (external alchemy) * ''[[Yangsheng (Daoism)|Yangsheng]]'' (self-cultivation) ** ''[[:en:Daoyin|Daoyin]]'' (calisthenics) * [[Taoist meditation|Meditation]] * [[Three Treasures (traditional Chinese medicine)|Three Treasures]] ** ''[[Jing (Chinese medicine)|Jing]]'' (essence) ** [[Qi]] (breath) ** ''[[Shen (Chinese religion)|Shen]]'' (spirit) * [[Taoist diet|Diet]] * ''[[Xian (Taoism)|Xian]]'' (immortality) * [[Taoist art|Art]] ** ''[[Fulu]]'' (talismancy) |group3 = Texts |list3 = * ''[[Tao Te Ching]]'' * ''[[Zhuangzi (book)|Zhuangzi]]'' * ''[[Liezi]]'' * ''[[Huainanzi]]'' * ''[[Taipingjing]]'' * ''[[Xiang'er]]'' * ''[[Sanhuangjing]]'' * ''[[Huahujing]]'' * ''[[Qingjing Jing]]'' * ''[[:en:Baopuzi|Baopuzi]]'' * ''[[:en:Daozang|Daozang]]''
|group4 = [[Chinese theology#Taoism|Deities]] |list4 = * [[Hongjun Laozu]] * [[Three Pure Ones]] ** [[Yuanshi Tianzun]] ** [[Lingbao Tianzun]] ** [[:en:Daode Tianzun|Daode Tianzun]] *[[:en:Four heavenly ministers|Four Sovereigns]] ** [[Jade Emperor]] ** [[Ziwei Emperor]] ** [[Tianhuang Emperor]] ** [[Houtu]] * [[Three Great Emperor-Officials]] * [[Queen Mother of the West]] * [[King Father of the East]] * [[:en:Eight Immortals|Eight Immortals]] * [[:en:Chang'e|Chang'e]] * [[Three Sovereigns and Five Emperors]] ** [[Yellow Emperor]] * [[Guan Yu#Worship of Guan Yu|Guan Shengdi]] * [[:Category:Taoist deities|''Other deities'']]
|group5 = People |list5 = * [[Laozi]] * [[Zhuang Zhou]] * [[Lie Yukou]] * [[Heshang Gong]] * [[Wei Boyang]] * [[Zhang Daoling]] * [[Gan Ji]] * [[Zhang Jue]] * [[Zhang Lu (Han dynasty)|Zhang Lu]] * [[Ge Xuan]] * [[He Yan]] * [[Wang Bi]] * [[Seven Sages of the Bamboo Grove]] * [[Guo Xiang]] * [[Wei Huacun]] * [[Ge Hong]] * [[:en:Bao Jingyan|Bao Jingyan]] * [[Kou Qianzhi]] * [[Lu Xiujing]] * [[Tao Hongjing]] * [[:en:Cheng Xuanying|Cheng Xuanying]] * [[:en:Chen Tuan|Chen Tuan]] * [[Zhang Boduan]] * [[Sun Bu'er]] * [[Wang Chongyang]] * [[Qiu Chuji]] * [[Zhang Guoxiang]] * [[Zhang Sanfeng]] * [[Zhu Quan]] * [[:en:Fangshi|''Fangshi'']]
|group6 = [[Taoist schools|Schools]] |list6 =
* [[Huang–Lao]] * [[Way of the Taiping|Taiping]] * [[Way of the Five Pecks of Rice]] * [[Way of the Celestial Masters]] ** [[The Northern Celestial Masters|Northern Celestial Masters]] ** [[Zhengyi Dao|Zhengyi]] * [[Xuanxue]] * [[Shangqing School|Shangqing]] * [[Lingbao School|Lingbao]] ** [[Jingming Dao|Jingming]] * [[:en:Chongxuan School|Chongxuan]] * [[Quanzhen School|Quanzhen]] ([[Dragon Gate Taoism|Dragon Gate]]) * [[Wuliupai|Wuliu]] * [[Yao Taoism|Yao]]
|group7 = Sacred places |list7 = * [[Grotto-heavens]] * [[Sacred Mountains of China]] ** [[Wudang Mountains]] * [[Mount Penglai]] * [[Kunlun (mythology)|Mount Kunlun]] * [[Taoist temple|Temples]] ** [[:en:Cebu Taoist Temple|Cebu]] ** [[Taoist Temple (Hanford, California)|Hanford]] ** [[Louguantai]] ** [[Tong Jee Teung]] ** [[White Cloud Temple|White Cloud]]

{{Navbox |name = Taoism footer |title = [[Taoism]] |listclass = hlist |basestyle = background: #cce0f0; |state = {{{state|{{{1|autocollapse}}}}}} |image = [[File:BatQuaiDo_2.svg|80px|Taoism]] |above = |group1 = [[Taoist philosophy|Philosophy]] |list1 = {{Navbox|child|basestyle = background: #ddeef3;|group1 = [[Taoist cosmology|Metaphysics]] |list1= * '''[[Tao]]''' (way) * '''''[[Taiji (philosophy)|Taiji]]''''' (ultimate) ** ''[[Wuji (philosophy)|Wuji]]'' (non-polarity) ** [[Yin and yang]] (duality) ** ''[[:en:Bagua|Bagua]]'' (eight trigrams) * [[:en:Feng shui|Feng shui]] * ''[[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Wuxing]]'' (five phases) * ''[[:en:Bianhua|Bianhua]]'' (transformation) * ''[[:en:Fan (Daoism)|Fan]]'' (reversion) }} * {{Navbox|basestyle = background: #ddeef3;|child |group2 = [[Taoist ethics|Ethics]] |list2= * '''''[[:en:De (Chinese)|De]]''''' (integrity) * '''''[[Wu wei]]''''' (nonaction) * '''''[[Ziran]]''''' (spontenaity) ** ''[[Pu (Daoism)|Pu]]'' (plainness) * ''[[Zhenren]]'' * [[:en:Five Precepts (Taoism)|Five Precepts]] * [[Ten Precepts (Taoism)|Ten Precepts]] }} |group2 = Practice |list2 = * ''[[Neidan]]'' (internal alchemy) * ''[[Waidan]]'' (external alchemy) * ''[[Yangsheng (Daoism)|Yangsheng]]'' (self-cultivation) ** ''[[:en:Daoyin|Daoyin]]'' (calisthenics) * [[Taoist meditation|Meditation]] * [[Three Treasures (traditional Chinese medicine)|Three Treasures]] ** ''[[Jing (Chinese medicine)|Jing]]'' (essence) ** [[Qi]] (breath) ** ''[[Shen (Chinese religion)|Shen]]'' (spirit) * [[Taoist diet|Diet]] * ''[[Xian (Taoism)|Xian]]'' (immortality) * [[Taoist art|Art]] ** ''[[:en:Fulu|Fulu]]'' (talismancy) |group3 = Texts |list3 = * ''[[Tao Te Ching]]'' * ''[[Zhuangzi (book)|Zhuangzi]]'' * ''[[Liezi]]'' * ''[[Huainanzi]]'' * ''[[Taipingjing]]'' * ''[[Xiang'er]]'' * ''[[Sanhuangjing]]'' * ''[[Huahujing]]'' * ''[[Qingjing Jing]]'' * ''[[:en:Baopuzi|Baopuzi]]'' * ''[[:en:Daozang|Daozang]]''
|group4 = [[Chinese theology#Taoism|Deities]] |list4 = * [[Hongjun Laozu]] * [[Three Pure Ones]] ** [[Yuanshi Tianzun]] ** [[Lingbao Tianzun]] ** [[:en:Daode Tianzun|Daode Tianzun]] *[[:en:Four heavenly ministers|Four Sovereigns]] ** [[Jade Emperor]] ** [[Ziwei Emperor]] ** [[Tianhuang Emperor]] ** [[Houtu]] * [[Three Great Emperor-Officials]] * [[Queen Mother of the West]] * [[King Father of the East]] * [[:en:Eight Immortals|Eight Immortals]] * [[:en:Chang'e|Chang'e]] * [[Three Sovereigns and Five Emperors]] ** [[Yellow Emperor]] * [[Guan Yu#Worship of Guan Yu|Guan Shengdi]] * [[:Category:Taoist deities|''Other deities'']]
|group5 = People |list5 = * [[Laozi]] * [[Zhuang Zhou]] * [[Lie Yukou]] * [[Heshang Gong]] * [[Wei Boyang]] * [[Zhang Daoling]] * [[:en:Gan Ji|Gan Ji]] * [[Zhang Jue]] * [[Zhang Lu (Han dynasty)|Zhang Lu]] * [[:en:Ge Xuan|Ge Xuan]] * [[He Yan]] * [[Wang Bi]] * [[Seven Sages of the Bamboo Grove]] * [[Guo Xiang]] * [[Wei Huacun]] * [[:en:Ge Hong|Ge Hong]] * [[:en:Bao Jingyan|Bao Jingyan]] * [[Kou Qianzhi]] * [[Lu Xiujing]] * [[Tao Hongjing]] * [[:en:Cheng Xuanying|Cheng Xuanying]] * [[:en:Chen Tuan|Chen Tuan]] * [[Zhang Boduan]] * [[Sun Bu'er]] * [[Wang Chongyang]] * [[Qiu Chuji]] * [[Zhang Guoxiang]] * [[Zhang Sanfeng]] * [[Zhu Quan]] * [[:en:Fangshi|''Fangshi'']]
|group6 = [[Taoist schools|Schools]] |list6 =
* [[Huang–Lao]] * [[Way of the Taiping|Taiping]] * [[Way of the Five Pecks of Rice]] * [[Way of the Celestial Masters]] ** [[The Northern Celestial Masters|Northern Celestial Masters]] ** [[Zhengyi Dao|Zhengyi]] * [[Xuanxue]] * [[Shangqing School|Shangqing]] * [[Lingbao School|Lingbao]] ** [[Jingming Dao|Jingming]] * [[:en:Chongxuan School|Chongxuan]] * [[Quanzhen School|Quanzhen]] ([[:en:Dragon Gate Taoism|Dragon Gate]]) * [[Wuliupai|Wuliu]] * [[Yao Taoism|Yao]]
|group7 = Sacred places |list7 = * [[Grotto-heavens]] * [[Sacred Mountains of China]] ** [[Wudang Mountains]] * [[Mount Penglai]] * [[Kunlun (mythology)|Mount Kunlun]] * [[Taoist temple|Temples]] ** [[:en:Cebu Taoist Temple|Cebu]] ** [[Taoist Temple (Hanford, California)|Hanford]] ** [[Louguantai]] ** [[Tong Jee Teung]] ** [[White Cloud Temple|White Cloud]]
|below =
}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude>

|group4 = [[Chinese theology#Taoism|Deities]] |list4 = * [[Hongjun Laozu]] * [[Three Pure Ones]] ** [[Yuanshi Tianzun]] ** [[Lingbao Tianzun]] ** [[:en:Daode Tianzun|Daode Tianzun]] *[[:en:Four heavenly ministers|Four Sovereigns]] ** [[Jade Emperor]] ** [[Ziwei Emperor]] ** [[Tianhuang Emperor]] ** [[Houtu]] * [[Three Great Emperor-Officials]] * [[Queen Mother of the West]] * [[King Father of the East]] * [[:en:Eight Immortals|Eight Immortals]] * [[:en:Chang'e|Chang'e]] * [[Three Sovereigns and Five Emperors]] ** [[Yellow Emperor]] * [[Guan Yu#Worship of Guan Yu|Guan Shengdi]] * [[:Category:Taoist deities|''Other deities'']]
|group5 = People |list5 = * [[Laozi]] * [[Zhuang Zhou]] * [[Lie Yukou]] * [[Heshang Gong]] * [[Wei Boyang]] * [[Zhang Daoling]] * [[:en:Gan Ji|Gan Ji]] * [[Zhang Jue]] * [[Zhang Lu (Han dynasty)|Zhang Lu]] * [[:en:Ge Xuan|Ge Xuan]] * [[He Yan]] * [[Wang Bi]] * [[Seven Sages of the Bamboo Grove]] * [[Guo Xiang]] * [[Wei Huacun]] * [[:en:Ge Hong|Ge Hong]] * [[:en:Bao Jingyan|Bao Jingyan]] * [[Kou Qianzhi]] * [[Lu Xiujing]] * [[Tao Hongjing]] * [[:en:Cheng Xuanying|Cheng Xuanying]] * [[:en:Chen Tuan|Chen Tuan]] * [[Zhang Boduan]] * [[Sun Bu'er]] * [[Wang Chongyang]] * [[Qiu Chuji]] * [[Zhang Guoxiang]] * [[Zhang Sanfeng]] * [[Zhu Quan]] * [[:en:Fangshi|''Fangshi'']]
|group6 = [[Taoist schools|Schools]] |list6 =
* [[Huang–Lao]] * [[Way of the Taiping|Taiping]] * [[Way of the Five Pecks of Rice]] * [[Way of the Celestial Masters]] ** [[The Northern Celestial Masters|Northern Celestial Masters]] ** [[Zhengyi Dao|Zhengyi]] * [[Xuanxue]] * [[Shangqing School|Shangqing]] * [[Lingbao School|Lingbao]] ** [[Jingming Dao|Jingming]] * [[:en:Chongxuan School|Chongxuan]] * [[Quanzhen School|Quanzhen]] ([[:en:Dragon Gate Taoism|Dragon Gate]]) * [[Wuliupai|Wuliu]] * [[Yao Taoism|Yao]]
|group7 = Sacred places |list7 = * [[:en:Grotto-heavens|Grotto-heavens]] * [[Sacred Mountains of China]] ** [[Wudang Mountains]] * [[Mount Penglai]] * [[Kunlun (mythology)|Mount Kunlun]] * [[Taoist temple|Temples]] ** [[:en:Cebu Taoist Temple|Cebu]] ** [[Taoist Temple (Hanford, California)|Hanford]] ** [[Louguantai]] ** [[Tong Jee Teung]] ** [[White Cloud Temple|White Cloud]]
